headline: Honeywell’s Expanded Digital and Defense Push Raises a Deeper Question About Its Future Mix (HON)
summary: Honeywell International recently announced it will provide connected services, advanced digital performance monitoring and operator training for the Dangote Petroleum Refinery in Lekki, Nigeria, while also entering new unmanned aerial and defense technology collaborations with Odys Aviation and LIG Nex1. By combining its Honeywell Forge platform, digital twins and defense-focused partnerships, the company is extending its digital and security solutions across both large-scale energy...
